prompt: Add soft shadows to the foreground dust based on the depth values to increase realism.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the cosmic nebula, by adding soft, natural-looking shadows to the foreground nebulous dust and clouds. Generate these shadows based on the depth values indicated in image 2, where the white areas correspond to closer foreground elements. The objective is to enhance the photorealism and three-dimensional depth of the cosmic scene.
objects: Soft, natural-looking shadows on foreground elements
